info.name: Teacher Portal API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Rumi Teacher Portal

Authentication Flow:
1. User receives invitation link → frontend calls /validate-token
2. User sets password → /setup
3. User logs in → /login
4. Access protected endpoints (dashboard, lesson-plans, etc.)
5. Password reset → /request-reset → /verify-reset-code → /reset-password

All authenticated endpoints require session cookie.

Mobile-First Design: All endpoints optimized for mobile clients.

request.description:
Validate invitation token before showing setup form.

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "user": {
    "firstName": "Ahmed",
    "lastName": "Khan",
    "phoneNumber": "923001234567"
  }
}
```

**Error Responses**:
- 400: Token expired
- 404: Invalid token
- 400: Portal already activated (redirectToLogin: true)

Complete portal setup by setting password.

**Password Requirements**:
- Minimum 8 characters
- At least one number

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Portal setup complete! Redirecting to dashboard..."
}
```

Creates session cookie automatically.

**Error Responses**:
- 400: Password too short or missing number
- 400: Token expired
- 404: Invalid token

Log in to teacher portal.

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "user": {
    "firstName": "Ahmed"
  }
}
```

Creates session cookie.

**Rate Limiting**: 5 attempts per 15 minutes

**Error Responses**:
- 401: Invalid credentials
- 429: Too many attempts

Log out and destroy session.

**Requires**: Authentication

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Logged out successfully"
}
```

item.name: Password Reset

request.description:
Request password reset code via WhatsApp.

**Flow**:
1. User enters phone number
2. 6-digit code sent to WhatsApp
3. Code expires in 10 minutes

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Reset code sent to your WhatsApp. Please check your messages."
}
```

**Rate Limiting**: Cannot request new code while previous one is valid (10 min)

**Error Responses**:
- 404: No portal account found
- 429: Previous code still valid

Verify the 6-digit reset code.

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Code verified. You can now reset your password."
}
```

Stores userId in session for next step.

**Error Responses**:
- 400: Invalid code
- 400: Code expired

Reset password after code verification.

**Requires**: Must call /verify-reset-code first

**Password Requirements**:
- Minimum 8 characters
- At least one number

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Password reset successful. Please log in with your new password."
}
```

**Error Responses**:
- 401: Code not verified
- 400: Password validation failed

item.description: Password reset flow via WhatsApp verification

item.name: Dashboard Data

request.description:
Get all lesson plans with pagination and filtering.

**Requires**: Authentication

**Query Parameters**:
- `page` (optional): Page number, default 1
- `limit` (optional): Items per page, default 20
- `type` (optional): Filter by 'lesson_plan' or 'presentation'

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "lessonPlans": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "title": "Photosynthesis",
      "subject": "Biology",
      "grade_level": "Grade 7",
      "content_type": "lesson_plan",
      "gamma_url": "https://gamma.app/...",
      "pdf_url": "https://storage.com/...",
      "created_at": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "total": 12,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

**Mobile Optimization**: Paginated for efficient mobile loading.

Get all coaching sessions with summary data.

**Requires**: Authentication

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "sessions": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "date": "2025-01-14T14:00:00Z",
      "duration": 2400,
      "overallScore": 87,
      "maxScore": 118,
      "percentage": 73.7
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "total": 3,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

**Mobile Optimization**: Returns summary data only, full details on separate endpoint.

Get full coaching session analysis.

**Requires**: Authentication

**Success Response (200)**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "session": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "date": "2025-01-14T14:00:00Z",
    "duration": 2400,
    "audioUrl": "https://storage.com/audio.mp3",
    "transcript": "Full transcript text...",
    "analysisData": {
      "overall_score": {
        "points": 87,
        "max_points": 118,
        "percentage": 73.7
      },
      "goal_scores": [
        {
          "goal": "Formative Assessment",
          "points": 15,
          "max_points": 20,
          "percentage": 75.0
        }
      ],
      "criterion_scores": [...],
      "strengths": ["Clear objectives", "Real-world examples"],
      "growth_opportunities": ["Increase wait time", "More collaboration"],
      "recommendations": [...]
    },
    "reportPdfUrl": "https://storage.com/report.pdf"
  }
}
```

**Security**: Returns only sessions belonging to authenticated user.

**Error**: 404 if session not found or doesn't belong to user.

item.description: Protected endpoints for accessing teacher data
